intro.title: Ca' Bianchini
intro.p1: Nestled in the Venetian countryside, Ca' Bianchini is a farmhouse with independent apartments, situated within an agricultural estate that has belonged to our family for generations. Here the land is still tended with care and respect for its natural rhythms.
intro.p2: The farmhouse has been restored while preserving its simplicity and original structure, opening it to hospitality. The five independent apartments offer bright, welcoming spaces designed for a comfortable and autonomous stay.
intro.p3: Days unfold between fields and nature. The pool, surrounded by greenery, is a place to pause and enjoy the open air. The location makes it easy to reach Treviso, Venice and the Prosecco hills, before returning to a peaceful and authentic setting.
intro.quote: We welcome those who choose nature and share its respect.

apartments.title: The apartments
apartments.p1: Ca' Bianchini offers five independent apartments, each with its own entrance and private spaces. Designed for families or groups of friends who want to experience the Venetian countryside with freedom and tranquillity.
apartments.p2: The interiors are bright and thoughtfully furnished, with simplicity and attention to detail. Each apartment is equipped with a fully fitted kitchen, living area and comfortable bedrooms.
apartments.p3: The property is surrounded by greenery and features a shared pool, private parking and generous outdoor spaces to relax during your stay.

soggiorno.title: Your stay
soggiorno.p1: At Ca' Bianchini, days follow the rhythm of the countryside. The pool, surrounded by greenery, is a place to stop and enjoy the fresh air. Around it, the fields of the Venetian countryside open up.
soggiorno.p2: At sunset the light changes colour and, on the clearest days, the gaze reaches as far as the mountains. A place for those seeking quiet, space and authentic contact with nature.

dintorni.title: Surroundings
dintorni.p1: The area surrounding Ca' Bianchini offers many opportunities for discovery, from art cities to countryside landscapes and nature trails.
dintorni.p2: The location makes it easy to reach Venice, the Prosecco hills and numerous itineraries to explore at a leisurely pace.

appartamenti.title: The apartments
appartamenti.subtitle: Five independent apartments
appartamenti.p1: Ca' Bianchini offers five independent apartments, each with its own entrance and private spaces. Designed for families or groups of friends who want to experience the Venetian countryside with freedom and tranquillity.
appartamenti.p2: The interiors are bright and thoughtfully furnished, with simplicity and attention to detail. Each apartment is equipped with a fully fitted kitchen, living area and comfortable bedrooms.
appartamenti.p3: The property is surrounded by greenery and features a shared pool, private parking and generous outdoor spaces to relax during your stay.
appartamenti.note: Heat pump climate control system (no air conditioning) · Small and medium dogs allowed on request (€50 fee) · Check-in 3:00–6:00 pm (no 24/7 reception) · Check-out 8:30–11:00 am

dintorni.title: Surroundings
dintorni.intro_p1: The area surrounding Ca' Bianchini offers many opportunities for discovery, from art cities to natural landscapes and outdoor trails. The location is ideal for those who want to enjoy the tranquillity of the Venetian countryside while being able to easily reach Venice, the Prosecco hills, the Dolomites and the Palladian villas.

treviso.title: Treviso
treviso.subtitle: The city of frescoes and canals
treviso.p1: Treviso is a charming art city, often overlooked by the main tourist circuits. Its medieval walls, canals and lively piazzas make it a pleasant destination to explore on foot or by bicycle.
treviso.p2: The historic centre is rich in frescoed churches, including the Cathedral and the Church of San Nicolò. The covered market, historic cafés and local gastronomic tradition complete the experience.

venezia.title: Venice
venezia.subtitle: A step from the lagoon
venezia.p1: Venice is easily reachable and is one of the most fascinating destinations in the area. A day spent among calli, bridges and historic palaces allows you to discover one of the most unique places in the world.

prosecco.title: The Prosecco Hills
prosecco.subtitle: UNESCO World Heritage Site
prosecco.p1: To the north stretch the Prosecco hills, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, characterised by vineyards, small villages and open panoramas.
prosecco.p2: The roads through the vineyards offer ideal routes for walks and wine tastings at local wineries.

dolomiti.title: The Dolomites
dolomiti.subtitle: UNESCO Natural World Heritage
dolomiti.p1: The Dolomites are reachable in about an hour and a half and offer some of the most spectacular mountain scenery in Europe, both in summer and winter.

ville.title: The Venetian Villas
ville.subtitle: Palladian architecture
ville.p1: The area is rich in historic Venetian villas, testimony to the culture and architecture of the Republic of Venice. Many of these estates are open to visitors and offer gardens, frescoes and environments linked to the history of the Venetian countryside.
ville.p2: Among the most celebrated are Villa Tiepolo Passi, a few minutes from Ca' Bianchini, and Villa Barbaro in Maser, a Palladian masterpiece decorated with frescoes by Paolo Veronese.

natura.title: Nature & trails
natura.subtitle: Itineraries through fields and rivers
natura.p1: The area offers numerous trails through nature, ideal for walks and cycling.
natura.p2: The Sile Cycle Path allows you to cycle along the river all the way to Treviso. The routes through fields and vineyards offer typical views of the Venetian countryside.
natura.p3: The Sile River Natural Park, a few minutes from Ca' Bianchini, is a protected area ideal for nature walks.

montagne.title: The mountains
montagne.subtitle: A step from the Dolomites
montagne.p1: The mountains of the Treviso and Belluno areas offer scenery of great beauty, with historic villages, alpine lakes and hiking routes for all levels.
montagne.p2: In winter, the ski resorts of the Dolomites are comfortably reachable in a day trip.

posizione.title: How to reach us
posizione.intro_p1: Ca' Bianchini is located in Lanzago di Silea, in the province of Treviso, surrounded by the Venetian countryside. The location is ideal for those who want to enjoy rural tranquillity while being able to easily reach Venice, the Prosecco hills, the Dolomites and the Palladian villas.

auto.title: By car
auto.content:
From the A27 motorway (Venice–Belluno), exit at Treviso Sud. Follow signs for Silea/Lanzago. Via Bianchini, 10.

You can use Google Maps for directions from your location.

treno.title: By train
treno.content:
Treviso Central Station (10 km). From there you can reach Ca' Bianchini by taxi or rental car.

We warmly recommend all our guests to enjoy the tranquil atmosphere of the Venetian countryside.

aereo.title: By plane
aereo.content:
Venice Marco Polo Airport (30 km) — closest and most convenient.
Treviso Antonio Canova Airport (15 km) — served by low-cost carriers.

bici.title: By bicycle
bici.content:
Reachable by bicycle in 15 minutes or on foot in about 40 minutes.

We partner with Treviso Bike for bicycle rental.

contatti.title: Send a message
contatti.subtitle: Fill in the form for any information request. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.tagline: Farmhouse surrounded by the greenery of the Treviso countryside, a few minutes from the historic centre of Treviso.

cookie_banner.title: We use cookies
cookie_banner.text: This site uses technical cookies necessary for its operation and, with your consent, analytical cookies (Google Analytics) to improve the browsing experience.

home.title: Ca' Bianchini — Farmhouse in Treviso with independent apartments
home.description: Farmhouse with 5 independent apartments nestled in the Venetian countryside in Lanzago di Silea (Treviso). Shared pool, private parking and EV charging. Near Venice and the Prosecco hills.

appartamenti.title: Apartments — Ca' Bianchini Farmhouse Treviso
appartamenti.description: Five independent apartments with fully equipped kitchens, Wi-Fi and shared pool. Ideal for families and groups. Ca' Bianchini, Lanzago di Silea (TV).

dintorni.title: Surroundings — Ca' Bianchini Farmhouse Treviso
dintorni.description: Discover the surroundings of Ca' Bianchini: Treviso, Venice, the UNESCO Prosecco hills, the Dolomites, Palladian villas and the Sile cycle path.

posizione.title: How to reach us — Ca' Bianchini Farmhouse Treviso
posizione.description: Ca' Bianchini is located in Lanzago di Silea (TV), near Treviso and Venice. Directions by car, train and plane to reach our farmhouse.
